_comment: OPEN (non-secret) config for the prod environment. Secrets (DB_PASSWORD, BINDGUI_SENDGRID_API_KEY, BINDGUI_SSH_KEY_PASSPHRASE) live in AWS Secrets Manager, not here. Bootstrap-only vars read before the app starts (BINDGUI_ENV, BINDGUI_FETCH_SECRETS) stay as task-definition env vars. Reflects current prod: still on the mock backend until the RIS SSH path is wired — flip BINDGUI_BACKEND to ssh and set the SSH_* keys when ready.
